definitions.text: Mutual; shared by more than one.
examples: The two competitors have the common aim of winning the championship.
Winning the championship is an aim common to the two competitors.

definitions.text: Of a quality: existing among virtually all people; universal.
examples: common knowledge, common decency, common sense

definitions.text: Occurring or happening regularly or frequently; usual.
examples: It is common to find sharks off this coast.

definitions.text: Mutual good, shared by more than one.
A tract of land in common ownership; common land.
